case_title: DAKIN, INC., A CORPORATION vs. JEFFREY'S TOYS, INC., A CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAKIN, INC., A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFREY'S TOYS, INC., A CORPORATION SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-10-1992

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $94.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAKIN, INC., A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFREY'S TOYS, INC., A CORPORATION
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAKIN, INC., A CORPORATION SERVED AUG-13-1992, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFREY'S TOYS, INC., A CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAKIN, INC., A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEFFREY'S TOYS, INC., A CORPORATION $6,743.98 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $543.21 INTEREST, $94.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,041.19
